Text.Page: I'm glad you're here. We've a need for priests' weapons in Chebika. I've materials for you if you're willing to make some magicworker's staves.
These will do nicely. Can you take them to Jakarian in Chebika?
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
These will help us save countless lives. You have my thanks.
